title: pallenis aurea
intro: Pallenis aurea, also known as the Golden Ragwort or Carthamus tinctorius, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pallenis aurea include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations.
